overall.description: Cinematic gameplay footage from Death Stranding showing a courier character carrying a tall stack of yellow cargo containers walking through a rainy, misty mountain canyon. The character navigates rocky terrain between steep cliff walls as heavy rain creates a hazy atmosphere with reduced visibility.

scene_state.functional_zone: rocky canyon slope with steep walls

agents.ego_description: walking steadily downhill along the rocky canyon path while carrying a tall stack of yellow cargo containers on back

entered.detail: steep rocky cliff face forming the left boundary of the canyon
tall rocky cliff wall on the right side of the canyon
uneven rocky ground with patches of dirt and small stones
prominent yellowish rock formation beside the path

segments.scene_description: The character descends a rocky slope within a narrow rain-soaked canyon. Steep cliff walls rise on both sides while heavy rain reduces visibility. The character navigates the uneven terrain carrying a tall stack of yellow cargo containers.

scene_state.functional_zone: canyon floor beside dry stream bed

events.description: stream bed becomes visible to the right of the walking path

agents.ego_description: continuing along the canyon floor beside a rocky stream bed, maintaining steady pace through the rain

entered.detail: rocky dry riverbed running parallel to the path on the right
jagged rock formation extending from the left cliff wall

segments.scene_description: The path levels out along the canyon floor where a rocky stream bed runs parallel to the right. The character walks steadily forward as the canyon walls remain visible through the misty rain, with the right cliff wall now closer to the path.

scene_state.functional_zone: steep rocky canyon section with dense vegetation

events.description: character begins ascending steep rock face blocking the path ahead

agents.ego_description: approaching and beginning to climb a steep rock wall at the canyon end, adjusting balance with the heavy cargo load

entered.detail: vertical rock wall blocking the forward path requiring climbing
dense bushes and grasses growing along the canyon floor

segments.scene_description: The terrain becomes rougher with increased scrub vegetation as the character approaches a steep rock wall. Heavy rain continues falling as the character transitions from walking to climbing, beginning the ascent up the rock face that blocks the canyon path.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a rain-soaked canyon that transitions from a steep descent to a challenging vertical climb. It begins with the character navigating a rocky slope between towering cliff walls, where heavy rain and mist severely limit visibility. As the path levels out, the camera tracks the character along the canyon floor beside a rocky stream bed, moving closer to the looming cliff wall on the right. The scene then shifts as the terrain becomes rougher with patches of scrub vegetation, leading the character toward a formidable rock face. Finally, the forward momentum turns upward as the character begins to climb the steep wall that blocks the canyon path.
